zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ann Dymoke於1405年出生在英國林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比時，她的父親Thomas Dymoke50歲，母親Elizabeth Hebden31歲。她與Thomas FitzWilliam IV結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1463年6月20日在英國林可爾史爾林肯享年58歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ann Dymoke于1405年出生在英国林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比时，她的父亲Thomas Dymoke50岁，母亲Elizabeth Hebden31岁。她与Thomas FitzWilliam IV结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1463年6月20日在英国林可爾史爾林肯享年58岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Ann

meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ann Dymoke was born in 1405, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Thomas Dymoke, was 50 and her mother, Elizabeth Hebden, was 31. She married Thomas FitzWilliam IV. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 June 1463, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ann Dymoke est née en 1405, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Dymoke, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hebden, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas FitzWilliam IV. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juin 1463, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Ann Dymoke 1405 in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Dymoke 50 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hebden 31. Sie hat Thomas FitzWilliam IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juni 1463 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ann Dymoke è nata il nel 1405 nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Dymoke, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hebden, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Thomas FitzWilliam IV. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 giugno 1463, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Ann Dymokeが1405年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Dymokeは50歳，母Elizabeth Hebdenは31歳であった。Thomas FitzWilliam IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1463年6月20日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで58歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ann Dymoke(이)가 1405년 영국 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Dymoke(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hebden(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Thomas FitzWilliam IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 6월 20일 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Ann Dymoke nasceu em 1405, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Dymoke, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hebden, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas FitzWilliam IV. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de junho de 1463, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ann Dymoke родилась в 1405 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Dymoke было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hebden, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas FitzWilliam IV. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 июня 1463 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Ann Dymoke nació en 1405, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Dymoke, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hebden, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Thomas FitzWilliam IV. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de junio de 1463, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
